name: Margaret Davies
bio: Retired schoolteacher. I learned to use a smartphone three years ago and I'm still learning every day.

name: Graham Fletcher
bio: Retired electrician. I ask more questions than I answer but everyone here has been so patient.

name: Rosa Martínez
bio: Recently retired nurse. I help my neighbours with their phones and now I help people here too.

name: Hans Bauer
bio: Former accountant. I use my iPad every day. Still figuring out some things but I get there.

name: Yvonne Petit
bio: Retired librarian. I love helping people find answers — now I do it online instead of in person.

name: Peter Kowalski
bio: Retired engineer. My granddaughter showed me this site and I have already learned so much.

name: Diane Moreau
bio: Just retired last year. Still working out what I do and don't know about technology.

name: Antonio Ricci
bio: Former restaurant owner. I use WhatsApp to stay in touch with my family. Learning more every week.
